title: Reading: A Trip to London
description: Texto sobre un viaje a Londres. Past Simple, comparativos, vocabulario de viaje.

items.explanation: En el texto: 'We stayed in a small hotel'. 'Stayed' = nos quedamos (Past Simple de stay).
Sirve para transporte (bus ticket, train ticket) y también para eventos (concert ticket).

steps.title: Vocabulario de viaje
steps.instruction: Palabras clave sobre viajes y turismo.

steps.title: Lectura: A Trip to London
steps.instruction: Leé el texto sobre un viaje a Londres. Prestá atención al Past Simple para narrar eventos pasados.

passage.title: A Trip to London
passage.text: Last summer, my friend Laura and I traveled to London. We stayed in a small hotel near the city center for five days. On the first day, we visited the British Museum. It was amazing and free! The next day, we took a boat ride on the River Thames. We could see Big Ben and the London Eye from the water. We also walked through Hyde Park and had a picnic. The food in London was more expensive than I expected, but the fish and chips were really good. On our last day, we went shopping at Oxford Street. I bought some souvenirs for my family. I would love to go back someday.
passage.translation: El verano pasado, mi amiga Laura y yo viajamos a Londres. Nos quedamos en un hotel pequeño cerca del centro de la ciudad por cinco días. El primer día visitamos el Museo Británico. ¡Fue increíble y gratis! Al día siguiente, hicimos un paseo en barco por el río Támesis. Podíamos ver el Big Ben y el London Eye desde el agua. También caminamos por Hyde Park e hicimos un picnic. La comida en Londres era más cara de lo que esperaba, pero el fish and chips estaba muy bueno. En nuestro último día, fuimos de compras a Oxford Street. Compré algunos recuerdos para mi familia. Me encantaría volver algún día.

questions.question: How long did they stay in London?
questions.explanation: El texto dice 'We stayed... for five days.'

questions.question: What was free?
questions.explanation: El texto dice el British Museum 'was amazing and free!'

questions.question: What did the narrator think about the food prices?
options: They were more expensive than expected.
They were the same as home.
questions.explanation: El texto dice 'The food in London was more expensive than I expected.'

questions.question: What did the narrator buy at Oxford Street?
questions.explanation: El texto dice 'I bought some souvenirs for my family.'

steps.title: Past Simple del texto
steps.instruction: Completá con el verbo correcto en Past Simple (forma irregular).

exercises.template: Last summer, we {0} to London and {1} in a small hotel.
On the first day, we {0} the British Museum. It {1} amazing!

steps.title: ¡Lectura completa!
steps.instruction: Practicaste narrar en pasado con Past Simple. Verbos irregulares del texto: travel→traveled, stay→stayed, visit→visited, take→took, walk→walked, go→went, buy→bought. La historia usa muchos marcadores temporales: last summer, on the first day, the next day, on our last day.
